layout.brand_description: Inspect Codex history coverage and export it
overview.description: See how much Windows Codex history is covered, what is limited, and what can be exported.
overview.current_description: Review the latest captured result and whether it is ready to hand off as ZIP.
overview.no_current_artifact: No inspectable artifact is available yet. Select threads and create an export first.
overview.coverage_description: Review what was read and which source types were used.
overview.coverage_missing: Coverage summary is not available yet.
overview.reliability_description: Review known gaps, degraded threads, and warnings.
overview.reliability_missing: Reliability summary is not available yet.
overview.recent_refresh_description: Review incremental intake results since the previous snapshot.
overview.recent_refresh_missing: No refresh history is available yet.
overview.recent_exports_missing: No export history is available yet.
environment.description: Review which source roots are read, which defaults are active, and which known limits apply.
environment.scope_description: Current default settings and read-only source range.
environment.coverage_description: Source types, included items, warnings, and limitations from the current artifact.
environment.coverage_missing: No artifact is available yet for environment inspection.
jobs.list.description: Review the current artifact, refresh results, and export history.
jobs.list.current_artifact_description: Review the latest successful full ZIP and refresh history.
jobs.list.no_current_artifact: No current artifact has been created yet.
jobs.list.refresh_no_threads: No threads were found for refresh.
jobs.list.download_confirm_body: Download the ZIP for export `{0}`. Review the included content and known gaps before continuing.
jobs.list.delete_confirm_body: Delete the run directory and history reference for export `{0}`. Make sure it is no longer active before continuing.
jobs.new.description: Inspect available threads and export the range you want to hand off.
jobs.new.source_description: Read-only current and backup Codex homes.
jobs.new.thread_description: Choose the conversation history to export.
jobs.new.default_selection_note: By default, all discovered threads are selected.
jobs.new.filter_placeholder: Filter by thread name, ID, or working folder
settings.description: Manage the defaults used for intake and export.
settings.defaults_description: Store default mounted source roots for Docker Compose runs.
details.description: Inspect what this export contains, which limits apply, and whether the ZIP is ready.
details.refresh_summary_description: Review what changed against the previous run and whether any thread degraded.
details.refresh_summary_missing: No refresh summary is available yet.
details.refresh_attention: Some threads lost coverage or could not be resolved compared with the previous run.
details.fidelity_description: Review what this run includes and where coverage is limited.
details.fidelity_missing: No fidelity report has been generated yet.
details.worker_log_description: Tail of the latest worker log.
details.no_worker_log: No worker log is available yet.
details.thread_coverage_description: Review source type, message count, attachment labels, and limitations per thread.
details.thread_coverage_missing: No thread coverage has been generated yet.
details.export_preview_description: Inspect key generated files before opening the ZIP.
details.export_preview_missing: No previewable artifacts are available yet.
details.timelines_description: Markdown previews for each thread timeline.
details.no_timelines: No timelines have been generated yet.
details.not_found_description: The requested export ID does not map to a run directory.
error.job_not_found: The selected export could not be found.
